name: Nakano Refrigerators Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nakano Refrigerators Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells refrigerated showcases, refrigerators, and related products in Japan. It also provides MD accessories and energy saving equipment; freezer/refrigerator controllers and unit coolers; and LED lighting for freezer/refrigerators. The company offers cold storage systems, commercial cold storage warehouses, and construction and equipment engineering services. Nakano Refrigerators Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
